name: .alter
summary: Rerun simulation with alternate parameters or analyses (HSPICE)

parameters.name: title_string
parameters.description: Optional title for this alter case.

dialectNotes: An .ALTER block may contain elements and many control statements (.PARAM, .LIB, .DATA, .DC, .TRAN, .OP, …). Analysis types already used in the main deck have restrictions—see the HSPICE user guide.
